subcategory.title: Monster Scooter
subcategory.description: Book for you and your family the next trip with a Monster Scooter. You stand on the stable scooter and let nature pass you by. Hand brakes on the handlebars and wide tires make the scooter easy to control. A trip together in a group is a nice and relaxing experience. With a Monster Scooter you have the choice whether you want to enjoy the view comfortably or organize a rapid descent

providers.name: SwissActivities
